extension_name.description: The display name for the extension.

extension_description.message: 拦截最烦人的广告和跟踪方式，包括 YouTube。
extension_description.description: Description of what the extension does.

popup_status_loading.description: Popup status shown while loading state is being resolved.

popup_disable_on_site.description: Label for the site-specific disable toggle in the popup.

popup_element_zapper.description: Section title for the element zapper controls in the popup.

popup_button_activate.description: Button label to activate element zapper mode.

popup_button_clear.description: Button label to clear all zapper rules for the current site.

popup_hint_tap_to_hide.message: 点按页面上的元素即可隐藏。若需手动选择器，请在清除器中使用“添加规则”。
popup_hint_tap_to_hide.description: Help text shown in the popup for how to use the element zapper.

popup_rules.description: Label for the disclosure button that expands saved zapper rules.

popup_button_open_app.description: Button label to open the containing native app from the popup.

popup_rules_empty.description: Empty-state text shown when no zapper rules exist for the current site.

popup_rule_delete_aria.description: Accessible label for deleting a saved zapper rule.

popup_error_load_rules.description: Error shown when popup fails to load zapper rules.

popup_error_delete_rule.description: Error shown when popup fails to delete a zapper rule.

popup_status_disabling.description: Transient status shown while disabling blocking on the current site.

popup_status_enabling.description: Transient status shown while enabling blocking on the current site.

popup_status_disabled.description: Status label indicating blocking is disabled on the current site.

popup_status_active.description: Status label indicating blocking is active on the current site.

popup_error_update_site_setting.description: Error shown when popup fails to update per-site enabled state.

popup_error_zapper_unavailable.message: 此页面无法使用元素清除器。
popup_error_zapper_unavailable.description: Error shown when zapper cannot be activated on the current tab.

popup_error_open_app.description: Error shown when popup fails to open the containing app.

popup_error_clear_rules.message: 清除元素清除规则失败。
popup_error_clear_rules.description: Error shown when popup fails to clear zapper rules for the current site.

popup_status_unsupported.description: Status label indicating current page does not support popup actions.

popup_status_checking.description: Status label shown while popup checks current page and state.

popup_error_load_popup.description: Error shown if popup initialization fails.

zapper_aria_label.description: Accessible label for the in-page element zapper toolbar.

zapper_status_tap_to_hide.message: 元素清除器：点按元素即可隐藏。
zapper_status_tap_to_hide.description: Default status text in the in-page element zapper toolbar.

zapper_button_undo.description: Button label to undo last zapper action.

zapper_button_more.description: Tooltip label for the overflow menu button in zapper toolbar.

zapper_button_add_custom_rule.message: 添加自定义 CSS 规则…
zapper_button_add_custom_rule.description: Menu item label for adding a manual CSS selector rule.

zapper_button_done.description: Button label to finish zapper mode.

zapper_button_select_parent.description: Tooltip for choosing the parent element in refine mode.

zapper_button_select_child.description: Tooltip for choosing the child element in refine mode.

zapper_button_hide.description: Button label for confirming hide action in refine mode.

zapper_error_enter_selector.message: 请输入 CSS 选择器。
zapper_error_enter_selector.description: Validation error shown when manual selector input is empty.

zapper_error_rule_syntax_invalid.description: Validation error shown when manual CSS rule syntax is invalid.

zapper_error_selector_too_long.description: Validation error shown when manual selector exceeds max length.

zapper_error_selector_syntax_invalid.description: Validation error shown when selector cannot be parsed.

zapper_toast_rule_exists.description: Toast shown when trying to add a duplicate manual rule.

zapper_toast_already_hidden.description: Toast shown when picked element is already hidden by existing rule.

zapper_toast_rule_saved.description: Toast shown after successfully adding a manual rule.

zapper_toast_hidden_and_saved.message: 已隐藏。规则已保存到此网站。
zapper_toast_hidden_and_saved.description: Toast shown after hiding selected element and saving generated rule.

zapper_prompt_enter_selector.message: 请输入此网站的 CSS 选择器
zapper_prompt_enter_selector.description: Prompt text shown when user adds a manual selector rule.

zapper_toast_undone.description: Toast shown after undoing the last zapper action.

zapper_status_refine.description: Refine-mode status text. Placeholder 1 is element label and placeholder 2 is hide action label.

zapper_toast_unable_create_rule.message: 无法为该元素创建规则。
zapper_toast_unable_create_rule.description: Toast shown when selector generation fails for selected element.

zapper_toast_enabled.description: Toast shown when zapper mode is enabled.

zapper_toast_disabled.description: Toast shown when zapper mode is disabled.

zapper_status_off.description: Status text shown after disabling zapper while keeping toolbar visible.
